title: Leah's Conglomerated Resources
description: The FULL Resource Pack containing all of Leah's trains from Cehntros, Clipstars, Kyslink Trains and many more!
body:
Adds trains and signs for the MTR mod from the Lucassian Railway Network

# Trains
- Class 161 | Cehntro | Converted Regional DMU
- Class 215 | Turbulink | Regional Battery-Turbine EMU
- Class 330 | Cehntro | Regional AC EMU + Refurbished Variant
- Class 430 | Cehntro | Regional DC EMU
- Class 431 | Cehntro | Regional DC EMU
- Class 715 | Kyslink G3 | Regional AC EMU
- Class 716 | Kyslink G3 | Metro AC EMU

# Signs
- Lucassian Railways
- Regional Railways
- GAMA

# Other
- Lucassian Language Setting

# Planned
Listed Below is planned content for the pack.
Please note that release dates for each version is not at all confirmed but when I feel that the content for the version I am working is in a good enough state then I am ready to release the next version either immediately or plan a release date two weeks before it gets released for me to start work on the next version or beta test the pack.
## LCR4 | v0.6.0
- Mark 3 Coach
- Flatbed Freight Carriage (64+ Variants)
- Class 67 | Heavy Duty Diesel Freight Locomotive
- Class 90 | High Speed Freight + Passenger AC Locomotive
- Class 159 | Kyslink G2 - Kysluka | Regional DMU
- Class 160 | Kyslink G2 - Kysluka | Regional DMU
- Class 161 Cab
- Class 162 | Cehntro | Converted Metro DMU
- Class 172 | Clipstar | Regional DMU
- Class 173 | Clipstar | Regional DMU
- Class 174 | Clipstar | Regional DMU
- Class 330 Cab
- Class 331 | Cehntro | Commuter AC EMU
- Class 335 | Millenium Sprinter | Commuter AC EMU
- Class 336 | Kyslink G2 - Kysluka | Regional EMU
- Class 341 | Cehntro | Converted Metro AC EMU
- Class 361 | Clipstar | Regional AC EMU
- Class 430 Cab
- Class 431 Cab
- Class ??? | ????? | ???? ?? ???
- Class ??? | ????? | ???? ?? ???
- Class ??? | ????? | ???? ?? ???
- Kyslink G3 Liveries Refresh
- Cehntro Refresh
- Lucassian Language Removal

## Other Planned Content
- Audio Announcements
- Decoration Objects Models
- Official Modpack
- Partnerships for Official Ads on supported trains

# Patreon
Join our patreon to enjoy benefits such as:
- Hybrid Units
- Named Units
- Your very own Named Unit
- Commission a train with the **High Class Member** tier

[Membership](https://www.patreon.com/c/lucasshire/membership)
